title: feat: route helper bot generation through pro
known_problem: Helper bot generation routes through private pro. Guard pro and run focused helper bot tests.

commands.name: pro_submodule_guard
commands.shell: test -e pro || (echo 'private pro submodule is required for this PR' >&2; exit 2)
commands.reason: Helper bot pro route must not be evaluated without private pro.

commands.name: service_helper_bot_tests
commands.shell: pnpm exec vitest run test/core/chat/topAgentDispatch.test.ts test/core/chat/topAgentUtils.test.ts -c vitest.config.ts
commands.reason: Run focused helper bot dispatch tests.

commands.name: prepare_sdks
commands.reason: Rebuild generated SDK dist files after git clean before app build.

commands.name: build_projects_app
commands.reason: Helper bot app API/UI must compile through app build.
